title: Vendor the typelift org at maintainers/typelift/ as git submodules
description: Phase A.2 of typelift-substrate-modernization. Depends on `typelift-org-catalog-audit` completing first for the full-org sweep. For each permissively licensed repo in the typelift org, add as git submodule at `private/universal/substrate/maintainers/typelift/public/universal/tooling/spm/<RepoName>/`. Pin to most-recent stable tag (or HEAD if no suitable tag exists). SwiftCheck was operator-promoted on 2026-05-28 and is already present as the first maintainer submodule; it is MIT licensed and pinned to HEAD after tag 0.12.0. Single omnibus commit OR per-repo commits — operator preference required for the remaining sweep. After landing: substrate has the typelift catalog as reference / lineage / provenance evidence; substrate doesn't depend on any of it; substrate-owned forks land separately under wrkstrm-core or swift-universal per Phase C. Sub-tasks: (1) update .gitmodules per submodule add; (2) verify each submodule clones cleanly on a fresh substrate checkout; (3) record vendoring decision in the thread's activities[].
